## Scoring Dimensions

### 1. Technical Skills Match (0-100)
Strong match: COO/Operations, Odoo ERP, AI Transformation, Delivery Operations, Python, LLM/RAG.
Weak match: pure junior dev roles without leadership.

### 2. Experience Match (0-100)
Strong: COO, Operations Director, Odoo ERP, AI Transformation leadership.

### 3. Location
Szczecin, zachodniopomorskie, remote Polska, hybrid Warszawa/Trójmiasto OK.

### Overall
strong | moderate | weak based on combined dimensions.
